pageContext.name: Green Lantern: Brightest Day
pageContext.description: Lanterns, light 'em up!   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Green Lantern: Brightest Day Fine Art Print, a vibrant DC Comics art print by artist Alex Garner.  Lantern Corps officers guard the universe in sectors using rings that represent their guiding principles and emotions. Based on the Brightest Day storyline in DC Comics, this colorful composition shows a fearless Hal Jordan wielding the Green Lantern ring, a testament to his willpower. He is surrounded by six of the Emotional Entities, born when the White Light was shattered by the Darkness. In the spectrum, yellow Parallax embodies fear, orange Ophidian stands for greed, the red Butcher is guided by rage, the Predator's purple form represents love, indigo Proselyte signifies compassion, and blue Adara personifies hope. In the center, piercing light from the White Lantern Power Battery divides the colors, separating their paths in life for all time.  Originally created as a variant cover to Green Lantern: Brightest Day #54 (2010), written by Geoff Johns for DC Comics, this comic book collectible is now available in a fine art format for fans. Each Green Lantern: Brightest Day Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 275 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed format, this super hero artwork is one that Green Lantern fans across the galaxy won't want to miss!  Even those strongest in willpower cannot resist the Green Lantern: Brightest Day Fine Art Print by Alex Garner. Add some guiding light to your DC Comics collection today!
